capabilities.name: Access Rights
capabilities.description: Design and implement ACL groups (ir.model.access), model-level permissions, and group hierarchies with implied groups.
examples: Create ACL for custom model with read/write permissions
Restrict delete permission to managers only
Design group hierarchy for sales roles

capabilities.name: Record Rules
capabilities.description: Define domain-based record rules (ir.rule) for multi-company, multi-department, and ownership-based data isolation.
examples: Add multi-company rule for custom model
Create ownership rule so users see only own records
Combine global and user-specific record rules

capabilities.name: Field Permissions
capabilities.description: Apply field-level security using groups= on fields, readonly attributes, and computed restricted fields.
examples: Restrict salary field to HR managers
Make internal notes readonly for some groups
Hide confidential fields from form view

capabilities.name: Group Design
capabilities.description: Create security groups, categories, implied groups, and role-based access control. Map business roles to Odoo groups.
examples: Define category and groups for custom app
Map department roles to Odoo groups
Use implied groups to build role hierarchy

capabilities.name: OWL Security
capabilities.description: Handle OWL component security, RPC access control, user context, and client-side validation in Odoo 19 web framework.
examples: Protect OWL component action based on user group
Validate RPC permissions on server side
Use user context in OWL component

capabilities.name: Web Vulnerabilities
capabilities.description: Prevent XSS, CSRF, SQL injection, and unsafe eval. Use Markup, out-escaping, and proper controller decorators.
examples: Escape user-generated content in QWeb
Add CSRF token to custom form
Avoid raw SQL with user input

capabilities.name: Secure Coding
capabilities.description: Apply secure coding practices: avoid SQL injection, sanitize inputs, use sudo correctly, validate RPC calls, and protect sensitive data.
examples: Use sudo() only when necessary and log reasons
Validate and sanitize controller inputs
Store API keys in ir.config_parameter securely

capabilities.name: GDPR & Privacy
capabilities.description: Implement GDPR/privacy controls: data retention, right to erasure, privacy lookup, anonymization, consent tracking, and lawful basis.
examples: Configure privacy lookup for a contact
Anonymize personal data on partner deletion
Set up data retention policy for logs

capabilities.name: Audit & Logging
capabilities.description: Configure audit trails, field tracking, log access, record change tracking, and security event monitoring.
examples: Enable field tracking on sensitive fields
Log security-relevant events
Review record access log
